name: Shilajit
summary: Shilajit entry from SciSpace evidence pass. Evidence level: low.
description: Shilajit is a mineral/fulvic acid-containing complex; fulvic compounds may enhance nutrient bioavailability and show preclinical mitochondria-related protective effects.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.

claimMap.claim: v9.4: One human trial suggests testosterone effects with purified shilajit; contamination/quality risk prevents top-tier ranking.
claimMap.notes: v9.4: One human trial suggests testosterone effects with purified shilajit; contamination/quality risk prevents top-tier ranking.

qualifiers.dose_or_duration: 250 mg twice daily purified shilajit used in a testosterone trial

sources.title: PubMed PMID 26395129. Minimal citation row added from existing workbook PMID; title/year/journal still require PubMed metadata extraction.
